📅 Full Timeline
May 19, 2026
Birds handed to Aqeel · 1,125,000 PKR paid
May 23, 2026
Birds arrived Kuwait. 1 died in transit.
May 23 – Jun 3
CITES papers rejected 3x · ring number issue (UAE rule since 2018)
Jun 3, 2026
Kuwait airport bombed · Iranian drone hit T1. All foreign flights suspended.
Jun 6, 2026
Kuwait CITES 26-KW-133 issued. New rings installed on all birds.
Jun 18, 2026
UAE MOCCAE approved · Certificate 26AE6651 issued. AWB booked same day.
Jun 20, 2026 · TODAY
Birds at Kuwait cargo. Flight tomorrow 09:10 AM.

died in
Kuwait hold

photographed
below
35
survivors on
KU671
Cause: ~29-day Kuwait hold, June heat 41-50°C, stress, repeated document delays.
Compensation: claim is against Aqeel (he admitted liability on 3), not the airline. The AWB waives natural-cause mortality.
Action: get all 10 dead ring numbers from Aqeel in writing.
🪦 Dead Birds (5 Photographed of 10)
10 birds died total during the long Kuwait hold. 5 are photographed here (one photo shows 2 birds); Aqeel confirmed the rest. These are the losses he owes compensation on (he has admitted liability on 3). Visible rings: Kuwait 143 and a green DS band. Note: the DS prefix is not on your 45-list, a possible sign of mixing with another breeder's birds, worth raising with Aqeel.
#1
Found in cargo bin. Ring not legible.
#2 & #3
Kuwait ring 143 + green DS ring visible.
#4
On tray. Green Kuwait closed ring on leg.
#5
On cage floor near seed. Ring not legible.
